glosses.zh-Hans: 绝望的; 没有希望的
glosses.ja: 絶望した; 希望がない

sentences.target: Je suis désespéré sans mon téléphone.

translations.fr: Je suis désespéré sans mon téléphone.
translations.de: Ich bin ohne mein Handy verzweifelt.
translations.it: Sono disperato senza il mio telefono.
translations.zh-Hans: 没有手机我快要崩溃了。
translations.pt: Estou desesperado sem o meu celular.
translations.vi: Tôi tuyệt vọng khi không có điện thoại.
translations.nl: Zonder mijn telefoon ben ik wanhopig.
translations.uk: Я у відчаї без свого телефону.
translations.hi: मैं अपने फ़ोन के बिना हताश हूँ.
translations.el: Είμαι απελπισμένος χωρίς το τηλέφωνό μου.
translations.nb: Jeg er desperat uten telefonen min.
translations.id: Saya putus asa tanpa ponsel saya.
translations.sv: Jag är desperat utan min telefon.
translations.da: Jeg er desperat uden min telefon.
translations.ja: スマホがないと絶望的だ。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person singular; functions as the clause subject.
Auxiliary/copular verb 'être', present indicative, 1st person singular; links the subject to a predicate adjective.
Predicate adjective, masculine singular; complements the copula and describes the subject’s state.
Preposition introducing a prepositional phrase of absence.
Possessive determiner, 1st person singular, masculine singular; modifies the following noun.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'sans'.

translations.de: Du bist wegen so einer Kleinigkeit verzweifelt.
translations.ko: 너는 그런 사소한 일로 너무 절망적이야.
translations.zh-Hans: 你为这么点小事就绝望了。
translations.yue: 你為咁小嘅事就咁絕望。
translations.ru: Ты в отчаянии из-за такой мелочи.
translations.pt: Você está desesperado por tão pouco.
translations.he: אתה מיואש בגלל דבר כל כך קטן.
translations.tr: Bu kadar küçük bir şey için çaresizsin.
translations.vi: Bạn tuyệt vọng vì chuyện nhỏ như vậy.
translations.ar: أنت يائس بسبب شيء بسيط كهذا.
translations.nl: Je bent wanhopig om zo weinig.
translations.uk: Ти у відчаї через таку дрібницю.
translations.hu: Ilyen kis dolog miatt kétségbe vagy esve.
translations.hi: तुम इतनी छोटी सी बात पर हताश हो.
translations.pl: Jesteś zrozpaczony z powodu takiej drobnostki.
translations.el: Είσαι απελπισμένος για κάτι τόσο μικρό.
translations.nb: Du er desperat over så lite.
translations.id: Kamu putus asa hanya karena hal sekecil itu.
translations.sv: Du är desperat över så lite.
translations.ro: Ești disperat pentru atât de puțin.
translations.da: Du er desperat over så lidt.
translations.ja: そんな些細なことで絶望している。

tokens.explanation: Clitic subject pronoun 'tu' with elision before a vowel; 2nd person singular subject.
Auxiliary/copular verb 'être', present indicative, 2nd person singular; links subject to predicate adjective.
Predicate adjective, masculine singular; complement of the copula referring to the subject.
Preposition introducing a reason/purpose phrase.
Degree adverb intensifying 'peu' (‘so’).
Adverb meaning ‘little/not much’; forms the fixed phrase 'si peu'.

translations.vi: Hôm nay tôi cảm thấy tuyệt vọng.
translations.hi: आज मैं हताश महसूस कर रही हूँ.
translations.nb: I dag føler jeg meg fortvilet.
translations.id: Hari ini aku merasa putus asa.
translations.sv: I dag känner jag mig desperat.
translations.da: I dag føler jeg mig desperat.

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person singular; clause subject.
Clitic reflexive pronoun, 1st person singular; marks pronominal use of the verb ('se sentir').
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; used pronominally with 'me' to mean ‘to feel’.
Predicate adjective, feminine singular; complements 'se sentir' and agrees with the subject’s gender.
Temporal adverb modifying the predicate.

sentences.target: On reste désespérés sans nouvelles de Léa.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ ʁɛst dezɛspeʁe sɑ̃ nuvɛl də lea/

translations.fr: On reste désespérés sans nouvelles de Léa.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ ʁɛst dezɛspeʁe sɑ̃ nuvɛl də lea/
translations.en: We're desperate with no news from Léa.
translations.es: Estamos desesperados sin noticias de Léa.
translations.de: Wir sind verzweifelt ohne Nachrichten von Léa.
translations.it: Siamo disperati senza notizie di Léa.
translations.ko: 레아 소식이 없어서 우리는 절망하고 있어.
translations.zh-Hans: 没有Léa的消息，我们很绝望。
translations.ru: Мы в отчаянии без вестей от Леа.
translations.pt: Estamos desesperados sem notícias de Léa.
translations.he: אנחנו מיואשים כי אין לנו חדשות מלאה.
translations.vi: Không có tin tức từ Léa, chúng tôi tuyệt vọng.
translations.ar: نحن يائسون بلا أخبار من ليا.
translations.nl: We zijn wanhopig zonder nieuws van Léa.
translations.uk: Ми у відчаї без новин від Леї.
translations.hu: Kétségbe vagyunk esve, mert nincs hír Léáról.
translations.hi: लेआ की कोई खबर न होने से हम हताश हैं.
translations.pl: Jesteśmy zrozpaczeni bez wieści od Lei.
translations.el: Είμαστε απελπισμένοι χωρίς νέα από τη Λέα.
translations.nb: Vi er fortvilet uten nyheter fra Léa.
translations.id: Kami putus asa karena tidak ada kabar dari Léa.
translations.sv: Vi är desperata utan nyheter från Léa.
translations.ro: Suntem disperați fără vești de la Léa.
translations.cs: Jsme zoufalí bez zpráv od Ley.
translations.da: Vi er desperate uden nyt fra Léa.
translations.fi: Olemme epätoivoisia, kun Léalta ei kuulu mitään.
translations.ja: レアから連絡がなくて、私たちは絶望している。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite subject pronoun (‘one/people’), often used colloquially as ‘we’; syntactic subject.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular (agreeing with 'on'); expresses a continued state.
Predicate adjective, masculine plural; agrees with the semantic ‘we’ even though 'on' takes singular verb agreement.
Preposition introducing a phrase of absence.
Common noun, feminine plural; object of 'sans' meaning ‘news/messages’.
Preposition marking source/origin; introduces a complement.
Proper noun (person’s name); complement of the preposition 'de'.
